## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Tests

- [ ] Not run
- [ ] Ran unit or integration tests
- [ ] Ran the CLI locally
- [ ] Checked generated project output

## Generated output impact

- [ ] No generated files change
- [ ] Generated files change and examples/snapshots were reviewed
- [ ] CLI prompts, flags, or defaults changed

## Release notes

- [ ] No release note needed
- [ ] Patch: bug fix or small maintenance change
- [ ] Minor: new CLI option, scaffold feature, or generated output change
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to ServerGen CLI or scaffold behavior
- [ ] Errors and edge cases have practical messages
- [ ] Documentation or examples are updated if user-facing behavior changed
